title: check --get-login when login
body:
Check --get-login is set in podman since it is not shared option from c/common and does not valid by the package.

Signed-off-by: Qi Wang <qiwan@redhat.com>

comments.body: LGTM, Not sure what this is for?

check whether --get-login is set
```
**--get-login**

Return the logged-in user for the registry.  Return error if no login is found.
```
